proposal.working_title: AI Automation for Service Businesses: Turn Tool Sprawl Into One System That Runs Itself
proposal.one_line_angle: Most companies bought AI tools and still work manually because they automated isolated tasks instead of connecting workflows; this is the done-for-you path from scattered tools to a system that runs the business.
outline_bullets: Why Buying AI Tools Did Not Actually Automate Your Business
What Real AI Automation Looks Like: Connected Workflows Over Point Tools
The Done-For-You Path From Manual Work to a Self-Running System
